details.description: LibreChat main before the Office pre-parse design and implementation batch

change_summary.expected_result: Current-turn Office attachments are parsed through the existing CodeAPI sandbox before model execution; parse failures stop before model billing, and reasoning-only replies are not saved as successful assistant output.
functions: Run one deterministic bounded Office pre-parse in the existing CodeAPI session
Inject the validated manifest into the current agent context
limitations: The injected preview is bounded to 20000 characters per file and 80000 characters per request; original files remain available in /mnt/data for complete tool-based analysis.
Legacy PPT parsing depends on the LibreOffice binary already present in CodeAPI.
change_summary.reason: Conversation 003971ae-274f-40a1-96a3-e05ab46b8f35 proved that valid Office uploads could reach CodeAPI without either provider choosing to invoke the code tool, producing empty or reasoning-only assistant siblings.
change_summary.risk: Protected LibreChat-API change in agent initialization and assistant completion validation. A parser or CodeAPI transport failure intentionally blocks the model request for the affected Office turn. Normal no-file chat, upload persistence, artifact generation, download cards, CodeAPI source, and other services are unchanged.

details.command: Restore timestamp-matched /opt/librechat/office-context-patch/BaseClient.js.bak-* and api-index.cjs.bak-* created by deployment/production-patches/2026-07-19-office-preparse-gate/scripts/deploy.sh, then restart only LibreChat-API and verify main root, /api/config, /office/, CodeAPI health, normal chat, and Office download cards.

validation_plan.expected: Current-turn isolation, Office fixture parsing, no-file bypass, parser failure blocking, missing-reference blocking, integration order, and reasoning-only rejection pass.
Existing empty-response and generic file-pipeline contracts pass.
An exact 2cc9a4ce artifact contains the canonical BaseClient/API patches, release tests, and governed local/remote deploy runners.

validation_plan.command: Authenticated fresh Office conversation with at least one DOCX and one XLSX
validation_plan.expected: CodeAPI pre-parse completes before the model request, a visible answer is returned, and no blank assistant sibling is persisted.
